S.FORM: == Al Brightman == siwkay niza Al Brightman (9 a bulad 22 a demiad, 1923 a mihcan), miunduay. (mapatay i 1992 a mihca), mimali ciniza i Amilika NBA. napasubana' i Siyatu tabakiay a cacudadan. u sulit nu Hulam atu Amilika Al Brightman was an American professional basketball player and coach. Born in Eureka, California, he played collegiately for the California State University, Long Beach, and was drafted by the Cleveland Indians out of Wilson High School in Long Beach, Ca. kakuniza kalunasulitan-sulu
S.PHON: == ar~…æ brigƒßtman == siwkaj niza ar~…æ brigƒßtman (* a bur~…æad ** a d…ômiad, **** a miƒß ¶an), miunduaj. (mapataj i **** a miƒß ¶a), mimar~…æi ¶iniza i amir~…æika nba. napasubana î~ ° i sijatu tabakiaj a ¶a ¶udadan. u sur~…æit nu ƒßur~…æam atu amir~…æika ar~…æ brigƒßtman was an am…ôri ¶an prof…ôssionar~…æ bask…ôtbar~…ær~…æ pr~…æaj…ôr and ¶oa ¶ƒß. born in …ôur…ôka, ¶ar~…æifornia, ƒß…ô pr~…æaj…ôd ¶or~…ær~…æ…ôgiat…ôr~…æj for tƒß…ô ¶ar~…æifornia stat…ô uni*…ôrsitj, r~…æo≈ã b…ôa ¶ƒß, and was draft…ôd bj tƒß…ô ¶r~…æ…ô*…ôr~…æand indians out of wir~…æson ƒßigƒß s ¶ƒßoor~…æ in r~…æo≈ã b…ôa ¶ƒß, ¶a. kakuniza kar~…æunasur~…æitan-sur~…æu
S.FORM: == Al Brightman == siwkay niza Al Brightman (9 a bulad 22 a demiad, 1923 a mihcan), miunduay. (mapatay i 1992 a mihca), mimali ciniza i Amilika NBA. napasubana' i Siyatu tabakiay a cacudadan. u sulit nu Hulam atu Amilika Al Brightman was an American professional basketball player and coach. Born in Eureka, California, he played collegiately for the California State University, Long Beach, and was drafted by the Cleveland Indians out of Wilson High School in Long Beach, Ca. kakuniza kalunasulitan-sulu
